creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Aldis,

I'm sorry that I wait that long to answer to this PR, I just didn't know 
what to do exactly with this issue. Now I have searched on mailing list 
and still there are some pieces of information that I couldn't find. 
First of all, was there any serious discussion about using TeXLive in 
ports? If not, why not just starting it on ports@? If so, what was the 
result? Is there any serious issue that has to be resolved before? What 
are those? Or just lack of testers, committers, etc.? Could you please 
clarify this? I would be more than happy to mark this port DEPRECATED 
because in fact, it is really really outdated.

Gabor
